listener_rules.reason: AG-UI EventSource tail transport, not a distinct human command surface
listener_rules.verified_applicability: Verified 2026-07-17: the TAIL_EVENTS registrations plus the fallback message event all feed the same onAguiFrame state-reconciliation handler after a run was already started by an inventoried composer control.

listener_rules.reason: session WebSocket lifecycle and frame transport, not a human-operated entry
listener_rules.verified_applicability: Verified 2026-07-17: open/message/close/error registrations maintain the session transport, update connection state, and deliver frames; originating send/reconnect controls are inventoried elsewhere.

listener_rules.reason: expanded combo rows are collected from the shortcut registry; the single router listener would double-count them

listener_rules.reason: viewport/layout observation, not an explicit human command

listener_rules.reason: viewport/layout observation, not an explicit human command

Verified 2026-07-17: all 5 listeners refresh read-only version/agent data, reacquire a UI lease, reconcile chat visibility state, or flush logs; none is a user command entry.
Verified 2026-07-17: both listeners only refresh GET /api/version data or maintain the active-tab UI lease.

Verified 2026-07-17: the sole listener converts rejected promises into health telemetry and exposes no human-operated action.

listener_rules.reason: iframe health/console/network/telemetry ingestion, not a human-operated message effect

listener_rules.reason: VAG action manifest/result transport; concrete action controls are inventoried at their registry declarations

listener_rules.reason: iframe shortcut forwarding transport; concrete shortcut rows are collected from the shortcut registry

Verified 2026-07-17: all 5 listeners mirror onboarding, browser prefs, locale, provider, or reply-language state written by another tab; origin controls are inventoried elsewhere.

Verified 2026-07-17: the sole listener sends the queued observability log beacon during document teardown.
Verified 2026-07-17: the sole listener boots the iframe SDK transport after resource load; it is not a human-operated entry.
Verified 2026-07-17: both registrations use the shared UI_ACTION_DISPATCH_EVENT constant and only render AI highlights or record action trajectory after the originating action was inventoried.
Verified 2026-07-17: the interface and chat listeners only re-read onboarding milestones after an already-inventoried originating control changes them.

listener_rules.reason: internal continuation from an already-inventoried composer send attempt
listener_rules.verified_applicability: Verified 2026-07-17: ConnectModelPrompt opens after the composer detects a missing model path; the user's send control is the command entry.
Verified 2026-07-17: the composer resumes the pending message after ConnectModelPrompt succeeds; it is not a second user command.
Verified 2026-07-17: both EventSource listeners only update confirmation/plugin-reload state from server transport events; user verdict/run controls are inventoried at their buttons/forms.

subscription_rules.reason: React callback-prop invocation, not a source-level subscription registration

subscription_rules.reason: React class callback-prop invocation, not a source-level subscription registration

subscription_rules.reason: Session stream transport subscription, not a distinct human-operated command
